nodes.name: RSS Read
nodes.notes: Keyless AI news RSS source. Swap this URL for a curated feed if Google News RSS is flaky.

nodes.name: Sort Newest First
nodes.notes: Sort by RSS date descending so the newest stories are first.

nodes.name: Limit To Top 5
nodes.notes: Send only five candidate headlines to the model to keep token use small.

nodes.name: Prepare AI Prompt
nodes.notes: Combine the five RSS items into one compact prompt for OpenAI.

nodes.name: OpenAI Briefing
nodes.notes: Uses the same model as the launch board demo: gpt-4o-mini. The API key must be supplied as OPENAI_API_KEY in the n8n environment.

nodes.name: Parse AI Briefing
nodes.notes: Parse the model JSON into clean final workflow output.
